title: Contextualise diagnostic tests
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Contextualise diagnostic tests demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Research diagnostic testing principles and processes

pcs.text: Conduct a literature review on tree-related research and diagnostic test case studies
